2606.31718.title: Cross-lingual Relation Extraction with Large Language Models: Zero-Shot, Few-Shot, and Fine-Tuned Evaluation on Romanian
2606.31718.paper_summary: Relation extraction (RE) for low-resource languages is typically constrained by the lack of annotated corpora. We investigate the feasibility of cross-lingual RE for Romanian by combining automatic dataset translation with large language model (LLM) inference. We translate the SemEval-2010 Task 8 benchmark from English to Romanian using an LLM-based translation pipeline and evaluate Gemma 4 31B under zero-shot, few-shot, and QLoRA fine-tuned configurations, against four encoder baselines spanning 125M to 560M parameters: XLM- RoBERTa (base and large), Romanian BERT, and RoBERT- large. We assess two task formulations: relation classification with marked entities and end-to-end extraction. Our results show that Romanian incurs a 3 to 5 percentage point (pp) drop relative to English in prompt-only settings, that few-shot prompting provides marginal gains over zero-shot, and that QLoRA fine-tuning improves macro F1-Score by more than 22 percentage points in both languages while reducing the cross-lingual gap from 3.3 to 1.4pp. The encoder baselines come within 1-4pp of QLoRA Gemma on Romanian despite being 50-250 times smaller, with monolingual Romanian BERT at 125M parameters matching multilingual XLM-R at 278M. The case for using a 31B model for single-task RE on Romanian is therefore weak in deployment scenarios where compute matters. We release the translated dataset, evaluation code, and trained models.
2606.31718.paper_summary_zh: 關係提取（RE）對於資源匱乏的語言通常受到缺乏標註語料庫的限制。<lb/>我們通過結合自動數據集翻譯和大型語言模型（LLM）推理，調查了跨語言RE在羅馬尼亞語中的可行性。<lb/>我們使用基於LLM的翻譯管道將SemEval-2010任務8基準從英語翻譯成羅馬尼亞語，並在零樣本、少樣本和QLoRA微調配置下評估Gemma 4 31B，對比四個編碼器基準，參數範圍從125M到560M：XLM-RoBERTa（基本和大型）、羅馬尼亞BERT和RoBERT-large。<lb/>我們評估了兩種任務表述：帶有標記實體的關係分類和端到端提取。<lb/>我們的結果顯示，在僅使用提示的設置中，羅馬尼亞語相對於英語的下降幅度為3到5個百分點（pp），少樣本提示相對於零樣本提供了邊際增益，而QLoRA微調在兩種語言中將宏觀F1分數提高了超過22個百分點，同時將跨語言差距從3.3降低到1.4pp。<lb/>儘管編碼器基準的參數量比QLoRA Gemma在羅馬尼亞語中的表現小50到250倍，但它們仍然在1-4pp之內，單語羅馬尼亞BERT的125M參數與多語言XLM-R的278M參數相匹配。因此，在計算資源重要的部署場景中，使用31B模型進行單任務RE在羅馬尼亞語中的案例是薄弱的。<lb/>我們發布了翻譯後的數據集、評估代碼和訓練模型。
2606.31718.author: Dragos-Mitrut Vasile et.al.
2606.31718.authors: Dragos-Mitrut Vasile, Elena-Simona Apostol, Stefan-Adrian Toma, Adrian Paschke, Ciprian-Octavian Truica
